description: Author failing tests for M2's validation gates (GR2015 non-git workspace, GR2017 missing integrationGate sink, GR2018 empty integration set, GR2016 MAX_PATH warning) and the triad teardown (the two triad validators gone, GR2013/GR2014 no longer meaning the triad checks) - exercised through the public PlanValidator path so they compile against current code
